hero.name: Abdellah Chehri

about.title: About me
about.description1: I'm a software engineer and web developer based in Algeria. My journey began in 2019 during my first year of college, where I discovered my passion for technology and coding. Since then, I've been building responsive, scalable, and modern web applications, especially in the SaaS space using technologies like Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe.
about.description2: I focus on writing clean, maintainable code and delivering pixel-perfect user experiences.

testimonial.title: Client Testimonial
testimonial.quote: It was great working with him. He knows how to work. Highly recommended.
testimonial.rating: ⭐ 5.0 — Figma to Next.js conversion · Oct – Nov 2024
